title: refactor(shared): hoist duplicated model-stats fetch into shared/utils with injected cache
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Add shared/utils/model-stats.ts with TINYBIRD_MODEL_STATS_URL, TinybirdModelStats type, and getModelStats; cached fetcher is injected (not imported) so the module stays free of either service's diverged cache.ts (enter any[] vs gen unknown[]).
- enter routes/model-stats.ts now imports getModelStats from @shared, passing enter's cached; delete enter's byte-duplicate utils/model-stats.ts.
- gen generation-access.ts imports getModelStats from @shared (passing gen's cached); gen utils/model-stats.ts keeps only getEstimatedPrice (single consumer) re-using the shared type.
- Net -83 lines; behavior identical (same URL, cache key, TTL, fetch + empty-data fallback).

Risks:
- Medium-risk PR: gen's balance-check pricing path now resolves through @shared; covered by gen test/realtime.test.ts (model-stats fetch) — passing.
- Did NOT remove the gen vitest "utils/model-stats.ts" alias the finding suggested: gen's model-stats.ts survives (holds getEstimatedPrice) and is still imported via @/utils/model-stats.ts, and gen's vitest config has no catch-all @/ alias — removing it would break test resolution.
- Tinybird pipe/token unchanged; packages/polli-cli stats.ts (different model_health pipe) intentionally untouched.

Deferred (out of scope / premise changed):
- FINDING 1.4: Remove the 'utils/model-stats.ts' entry from gen.pollinations.ai/vitest.confi — Premise broke. The step assumed gen's model-stats.ts would be fully deleted, but FINDING 1 explicitly KEEPS getEstimated

_~92 net lines removed · biome ✓ · gen.pollinations.ai: full suite (37 files, 262 tests) incl. test/realtime.test.ts (17) and ✓_

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the hive
gist.blurb: We've cleaned up some internal wiring, moving our model stats fetching into a shared utility. Less duplicated code means a healthier, happier codebase!
gist.summary: Refactored the Tinybird model stats fetching logic into a shared utility package, removing 83 lines of duplicated code across the enter and gen services.
gist.impact: This internal cleanup simplifies maintenance and ensures consistent model pricing and stats resolution across the platform without altering existing behavior.
gist.visual_concept: The bee organizing files or cleaning up a shared workspace, representing code deduplication. A robot helper holding a shared folder.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny janitor's hat, sweeping up loose code snippets into a neat pile. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holds a glowing folder labeled 'SHARED'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
